title: DUST_THRESHOLD 1000 < ZIP-317 min fee 10000; comment misleads
description: DUST_THRESHOLD = 1000 zatoshi but ZIP-317 minimum fee is 10000 zatoshi. The in-code comment says amounts below DUST_THRESHOLD are 'below dust threshold (fee would exceed transfer value)' — but the fee also exceeds the transfer value for amounts 1001–9999 zatoshi, which are silently accepted. Either raise DUST_THRESHOLD to 10000 (= ZIP-317 min fee) or change the comment to 'uneconomical: fee exceeds transfer value at typical fee levels' to accurately describe what the threshold guards.
